text:
Tree of Plenty 豊作の樹 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. This tree will bear many different fruits.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Tree of Plenty 豊作の樹 - This card summons forth a peculiar tree. This tree will grow a variety of different fruits, and the amounts will vary. The results are completely random, and no matter how much you harvest, the next day the tree will be full of new fruits. Combined with the Pitcher of Eternal Water card, a player could potentially live off the food and water from these two cards.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; width: 100%; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.009 - 豊作の樹 
ありとあらゆる果物が実る樹。どんなに収穫しても次の日には樹いっぱいに果物が成る。果物の種類と数はランダム。
|-
![Eng]
|No.009 - Tree of Plenty 
Every tree bears fruit. The fruit tree will be full again the next day when you harvest, no matter how. The type and number of fruit is random.
|}
